text.title: conversion-tracking Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for conversion-tracking as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Tracking purchase events only client-side (browser JavaScript).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Client-side purchase events are the most fraud-prone and lossy event type — ad blockers, ITP, and tab-close race conditions cause 20-40% loss. Use Stripe webhook server-side events as the authoritative source.

failure-mode.description: Adding 10 optional properties to every event "for completeness."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Downstream warehouses charge per row times column count. Sparse columns with mostly-null values inflate cost without analytical value.

failure-mode.description: Firing tracking events in test environments without a production guard.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Test runs burn through GA4 hit quotas and pollute conversion data with automated traffic, skewing funnel metrics.
